content: Deg yiwen n uqerruy, tella yiwet n tikti, deg sin n yiqerray, llant snat n tikta, deg kraḍ n yiqerray , llant kraḍet n tikta...
credits: Sentence from Tatoeba by Igider (CC-BY 2.0 FR)
relationships: ber:Deg yiwen n uqerruy, tella yiwet n tikti, deg sin n yiqerray, llant snat n tikta, deg kraḍ n yiqerray , llant kraḍet n tikta
